ListPreference.android:defaultValue: [Menu]-[Shoot Mode] ;scene-mode=auto; [Menu]-[Camera] ;drive-mode=single;self-timer=0; ;flash-mode=off; ;focus-mode=auto; ;focus-area-type=multi; ;af-mode=af-s; ;face-detection-mode=auto; [Menu]-[Image Size] ;image-size=large; ;image-aspect=3:2; ;storage-fmt=jpeg;jpeg-quality=50; [Menu]-[Brightness/Color] ;exposure-compensation=0; ;iso-sensitivity=0; ;whitebalance=auto;light-balance-for-white-balance=0;color-compensation-for-white-balance=0; ;metering-mode=multi; ;flash-compensation=0; ;dro-mode=auto; ;picture-effect=off; ;pe-posterization-effect=posterization-color;pe-toy-camera-effect=normal;pe-watercolor-effect-level=2;pe-hdr-art-effect-level=2; ;pe-illust-effect-level=2;pe-rough-mono-effect-level=2;pe-part-color-effect=red;pe-soft-high-key-effect=blue;pe-soft-focus-effect-level=2; ;pe-toy-camera-tuning=0;pe-miniature-focus-area=auto; ;color-mode=standard; ;contrast=0;sharpness=0;saturation=0; ;ae-lock=unlocked; Others(not arrenged. need help. not valid?) ;hdr-mode=off;dro-level=5; ;exposure-bracket-period=3; ;burst-drive-speed=high; ;hdr-exposure-difference-level=1; ;aspect=3:2; ;picture-size=4912x3264;
